# PH-Tools Documentation

> Unified documentation for PH-Tools open-source libraries: Passive House
> modeling, data exchange, and analysis tools for building energy performance.

## Navigation
- [LLM Instructions](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm-instructions.md)
- [Site Index (JSON)](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/site-index.json)
- [Raw Markdown Files](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/) (all docs as clean markdown)

## Honeybee-PH
Grasshopper-native Passive House modeling. Build PH-compliant models inside Rhino using familiar Honeybee components.
- [API Reference: _base](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/_base.md)
- [API Reference: space](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/space.md)
- [API Reference: foundations](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/foundations.md)
- [API Reference: bldg_segment](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/bldg_segment.md)
- [API Reference: site](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/site.md)
- [API Reference: team](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/team.md)
- [API Reference: phi](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/phi.md)
- [API Reference: phius](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/phius.md)
- [HVAC: _base](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/hvac/_base.md)
- [HVAC: ventilation](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/hvac/ventilation.md)
- [HVAC: heating](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/hvac/heating.md)
- [HVAC: heat_pumps](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/hvac/heat_pumps.md)
- [HVAC: hot_water_devices](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/hvac/hot_water_devices.md)
- [HVAC: hot_water_system](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/hvac/hot_water_system.md)
- [HVAC: hot_water_piping](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/hvac/hot_water_piping.md)
- [HVAC: ducting](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/hvac/ducting.md)
- [HVAC: renewable_devices](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/hvac/renewable_devices.md)
- [HVAC: supportive_device](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/hvac/supportive_device.md)
- [HVAC: fuels](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-ph/api/hvac/fuels.md)

## PHX
Passive House Exchange data model & file I/O. Convert between WUFI XML, PHPP Excel, and Phius report formats.
- [Developer: Architecture](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/dev/architecture.md)
- [Developer: Export / Import Patterns](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/dev/exporter-patterns.md)
- [Reference: PHX Model Reference](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/reference/phx-model-reference.md)
- [Reference: WUFI XML Schema](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/reference/wufi-xml-schema.md)
- [Reference: PHPP Field Mapping](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/reference/phpp-field-mapping.md)
- [Model: project](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/project.md)
- [Model: building](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/building.md)
- [Model: spaces](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/spaces.md)
- [Model: components](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/components.md)
- [Model: geometry](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/geometry.md)
- [Model: constructions](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/constructions.md)
- [Model: ground](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/ground.md)
- [Model: shades](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/shades.md)
- [Model: elec_equip](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/elec_equip.md)
- [Model: certification](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/certification.md)
- [Model: phx_site](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/phx_site.md)
- [Model: assembly_pathways](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/assembly_pathways.md)
- [Model: utilization_patterns](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/utilization_patterns.md)
- [Enums: building](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/enums/building.md)
- [Enums: hvac](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/enums/hvac.md)
- [Enums: foundations](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/enums/foundations.md)
- [Enums: elec_equip](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/enums/elec_equip.md)
- [Enums: phx_site](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/enums/phx_site.md)
- [Enums: phi_certification_phpp_9](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/enums/phi_certification_phpp_9.md)
- [Enums: phi_certification_phpp_10](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/enums/phi_certification_phpp_10.md)
- [Enums: phius_certification](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/enums/phius_certification.md)
- [HVAC: _base](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/hvac/_base.md)
- [HVAC: collection](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/phx/api/model/hvac/collection.md)

## Honeybee-REVIVE
Carbon & energy analysis for building design. Resilience & embodied-carbon workflows for Phius REVIVE.
- [API Reference: CO2_measures](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-revive/api/CO2_measures.md)
- [API Reference: fuels](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-revive/api/fuels.md)
- [API Reference: grid_region](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-revive/api/grid_region.md)
- [API Reference: national_emissions](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-revive/api/national_emissions.md)
- [HVAC: equipment](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-revive/api/hvac/equipment.md)
- [Weather: adjustment_factors](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-revive/api/weather/adjustment_factors.md)
- [Weather: resiliency_epw](https://docs.passivehousetools.com/llm/honeybee-revive/api/weather/resiliency_epw.md)
